endpoints.name: 2.1 Send Payments Information Public
endpoints.description: The second step to create a new transaction. Here, you have the option to send the data in three diferent ways: doing a private request, a public request or a private request that uses a saved Credit Card.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTIONID}} with a real transactionid.

endpoints.name: Affiliations
endpoints.description: Returns all affiliations that your provider can handle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Insert Affiliation
endpoints.description: Creates a new affiliation and returns a successful response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Affiliation By Id
endpoints.description: Returns associated data for the specified affiliation Id, like name and implementation, for example.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{AFFILIATIONID}} with a real affiliationid.

endpoints.name: Update Affiliation
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{AFFILIATIONID}} with a real affiliationid.

endpoints.name: Installments options
endpoints.description: Returns the best installment options according to the informed params.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Available Payment Methods
endpoints.description: Returns enabled payment methods, like visa, master, bankissueinvoice that are shown for the final user and enabled to receive payment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Rules
endpoints.description: Returns all rules conditions your provider can handle.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Insert Rule
endpoints.description: Creates a new rule and returns a successful response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Rule By Id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RULEID}} with a real ruleid.

endpoints.name: Rule By Id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RULEID}} with a real ruleid.

endpoints.name: Delete Rule
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RULEID}} with a real ruleid.

endpoints.name: 3. Send Additional Data
endpoints.description: The third step to create a new transaction. It will send the additional related data to the transaction, like billig and shipping adress.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTIONID}} with a real transactionid.

endpoints.name: Do authorization
endpoints.description: The fouth and last step to create a new transaction. It will authorized the new transction creation acorrdint to the data previously informed in the latests requests.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTIONID}} with a real transactionid.

endpoints.name: Cancel the transaction
endpoints.description: Cancel's transaction that was previously approved, but not settled.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTIONID}} with a real transactionid.

endpoints.name: Refund the transaction
endpoints.description: Refunds transaction's value that was previously settled.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{TRANSACTIONID}} with a real transactionid.
